description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a stylized, blocky form and simplified anatomical features. The figure has a broad upper body, with arms positioned close to the sides and legs slightly apart, suggesting a neutral standing posture. The head is rounded and proportionate to the body, with no visible facial details or hair texture. The clothing appears to be a single-piece outfit, fitted closely to the body, with no visible accessories or additional layers. The surface is smooth and uniform, with a matte finish and no visible seams or fabric details. The overall appearance is abstract and minimalistic, suitable for use as a generic urban pedestrian figure.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian figure with a blocky, minimalistic form and smooth, matte surface, standing in a neutral pose.
description_view_0: The lower portion of the figure is visible, showing the legs and part of the torso with a smooth, continuous surface.
description_view_1: The upper body and head are partially visible, with the blocky form and smooth finish evident.
description_view_2: A side view highlighting the angular contours of the torso and the simplified arm and leg shapes.
description_view_3: A broad view of the back or side, showing the uninterrupted, matte surface and the figure's overall proportions.
